introSection: Draken is a steel Dive Coaster located at Gyeongju World in Gyeongju, Gyeongsangbuk-do, South Korea. It was manufactured by Bolliger & Mabillard and opened in 2018 as part of a new alpine themed area. The ride replaced Space 2000.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Draken is a clone of Griffon at Busch Gardens Williamsburg.

fullText:
Draken is a steel Dive Coaster located at Gyeongju World in Gyeongju, Gyeongsangbuk-do, South Korea. It was manufactured by Bolliger & Mabillard and opened in 2018 as part of a new alpine themed area. The ride replaced Space 2000.

Draken is a clone of Griffon at Busch Gardens Williamsburg.



[[Category: Roller coasters manufactured by Bolliger & Mabillard]]
